parameters.name: search_movie
parameters.description: Search for movies by title. Parameters: query (movie title, required), year (release year to filter, optional)

parameters.name: search_tv
parameters.description: Search for TV shows by title. Parameter: query (TV show title, required)

schema.description: TV show title to search for

parameters.name: get_trending
parameters.description: Get trending movies and TV shows. Parameters: media_type ('movie', 'tv', or 'all', optional, default 'all'), time_window ('day' or 'week', optional, default 'week')

schema.description: Type: movie, tv, or all (default: all)
Time window: day or week (default: week)
